title: An evaluation of the impact of a double preceptorship model on nursing students' career adaptability: a quasi-experimental study.
summary: Preceptorship is a crucial component of nursing education in the final year, as it facilitates the transition to being a registered nurse. title: Artificial Intelligence-Ready Doctor of Nursing Practice Education: A Competency-Based Approach.
